description_long: This is a large, rectangular event banner supported by a sturdy metal frame. The banner material appears to be a glossy, flexible fabric or vinyl, tightly stretched and secured with evenly spaced fasteners along the perimeter. The frame consists of thin, tubular metal poles forming a freestanding structure with two horizontal stabilizing feet at the base. The banner displays partial text and graphics, including the word 'JOKER' and a stylized silhouette, suggesting it is used for promotional or informational purposes at public events. The surface is highly reflective, indicating a smooth, polished finish. The overall construction is lightweight yet stable, designed for temporary placement in open urban environments.
description: A glossy, rectangular event banner with a metal frame and reflective printed surface, supported by two horizontal feet. The banner features partial text and graphics, suitable for public display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full printed banner surface, including visible text and graphics, with the metal frame and fasteners clearly outlined.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the banner and the tubular metal frame, with the horizontal stabilizing feet visible at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back of the banner and frame, with the reverse side of the printed content faintly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the slim structure and the supporting feet, with minimal banner surface visible.
